title: Clever LMS Connect - API Reference
heading: Assignments
content:
The `state` value is automatically updated by the API based on teacher actions in the UI (e.g., if a teacher un-publishes an assignment, the state automatically updates to `draft`).

  
PATCH /sections/<section\_id>/assignments/<assignment\_id> (Update Assignment)  
Updates an existing assignment in the specified section. Sample Request Body  

```json
{
  "title": "Second Title",
  "due_date": "2032-02-29T23:48:24.000Z",
  "points_possible": 50
}
```

  
Sample Response  

```json
{
  "data": {
    "assignee_mode": "all",
    "attachments": [
      {
        "title": "Clever | Connect every student to a world of learning",
        "type": "link",
        "url": "[https://clever.com](https://clever.com)"
      }
    ],
    "created": "2024-11-06T23:28:06.713Z",
    "description": "Example description",
    "due_date": "2032-02-29T23:48:24.000Z",
    "grading_type": "points",
    "id": "c8f5eced-1ae1-45d9-97ce-0d4f6c0157d5",
    "last_modified": "2024-11-06T23:35:10.000Z",
    "max_attempts": 1,
    "points_possible": 50,
    "state": "open",
    "submission_types": [
      "link"
    ],
    "title": "Second Title"
  }
}
```

  
Required fields and values  

Parameter / Field

Location

Type

Notes

`section_id`

Path

String (ObjectID)

**Required.**

`assignment_id`

Path

String (UUID)

**Required.**

`(Various Fields)`

Body

Mixed

Include one or more of: title, description, attachments, due\_date, assignee\_ids, points\_possible, submission\_types, max\_attempts, term\_id.

  
Unsupported fields  

LMS

Unsupported Fields

**Canvas**

`start_date` (Use `display_date` instead), `term_id`.

**Schoology**

`start_date`.

  
LMS-specific data quirks  

LMS

Behavior / Quirk

Notes

**Canvas**

`state` ignored

Canvas does not support updating the state field via the API.

**Google Classroom**

Cannot update attachments

Field is ignored if included.

**Google Classroom**

`due_date` not required

A teacher may remove it.

**Schoology**

Attachment types

Only `text` attachment types are supported for writes (`link` is only supported for reads). For Schoology writes, `type: "text"` attachments must include a `text` field. Do not send `url` for `text` attachments. Example attachment: `{"type":"text","text":"https://clever.com/attachment","title":"Test - 1"}`.

  
DELETE /sections/<section\_id>/assignments/<assignment\_id> (Delete Assignment)  
Deletes an existing assignment in the specified section. Sample Request Body  
_(No Request Body for DELETE requests)_  
Sample Response  
Upon deletion success, the Clever API will respond with HTTP code 200 and an empty response.  
Required fields and values  

Parameter / Field

Location

Type

Notes

`section_id`

Path

String (ObjectID)

**Required.**

`assignment_id`

Path

String (UUID)

**Required.**

  
Unsupported fields  
_(None)_  
LMS-specific data quirks  
_(None)_
